label: Future Classic
verdict: A rare, well-preserved RX-7 with tasteful mods, but be prepared for rotary maintenance costs.
whatMakesSpecial: The RX-7 Efini Type R is one of the last great rotary sports cars with a twin-turbo setup that modern emissions standards have made extinct.
whyEnthusiastsCare: The RX-7 is a legendary name in the JDM scene, known for its lightweight chassis, rotary engine, and timeless design â it's a car that defined an era.

ownerVibe.label: Weekend Warrior
ownerVibe.reasoning: The car is stored securely, has low mileage, and the owner is clearly passionate about its condition and modifications.

carsCoffee.description: This RX-7 will draw a crowd with its classic JDM appeal and tasteful period-correct mods.

communityCredibility.description: The RX-7 is highly respected among JDM enthusiasts, with a strong community and aftermarket support.

socialStanding: The RX-7 is a JDM icon that commands respect and admiration wherever it goes.

specSignificance.note: Factory twin-turbo rotary engine is a key feature of the Type R.
Adds to the car's aggressive and period-correct appearance.
Period-correct wheels enhance the car's classic JDM look.

priceVerdict.reason: Low mileage and well-preserved condition with tasteful mods justify a premium in the current market.

priceOutlook.reason: As a future classic, the RX-7's value is likely to continue appreciating, especially for low-mileage examples.

issues.title: 13B Rotary Engine Rebuild
issues.detail: Rotary engines typically require a rebuild every 100,000km â budget $5,000â10,000 NZD.

issues.title: Cooling System
issues.detail: Ensure the twin oil coolers and cooling system are in top condition to avoid overheating issues.

issues.title: Vacuum Lines
issues.detail: Rotary engines have complex vacuum systems that can cause issues if not maintained.

steeringFeel.description: The RX-7's steering is direct and communicative, with excellent feedback that inspires confidence in corners.

engineCharacter.description: The 13B twin-turbo rotary engine is a unique experience, with a high-revving nature and distinctive rotary sound that builds excitement as it climbs to redline.

dailyComfort.description: While the RX-7 is a thrilling drive, its firm suspension and rotary quirks make it less suited for daily comfort.

overallFun.description: The RX-7 offers an exhilarating driving experience with its lightweight chassis, responsive steering, and unique rotary power delivery.

drivingCharacter.summary: A thrilling, high-revving rotary experience that rewards the enthusiast driver.

reasons: Last of the great rotary sports cars

regretRisk.reason: Potential rotary engine rebuild costs and maintenance requirements could be daunting for the unprepared.

marketTrend.reason: Interest in classic JDM sports cars is growing, pushing up values for well-preserved examples.

reasons: Rotary rebuild costs can be significant
High insurance premiums for performance cars

modPotential.powerCeiling: With upgraded turbos and supporting mods, the 13B can push over 300kW â expect to spend $10,000+ NZD for a reliable build.
firstMods: Upgrade the cooling system to handle increased power
Install a boost controller for more precise turbo management
modPotential.handlingUpgrades: HKS adjustable suspension is already a great start, but consider upgrading to a full coilover setup for track use.
modPotential.partsEcosystem: Strong aftermarket support both locally and internationally, with plenty of tuning shops familiar with the RX-7.
modPotential.collectorRisk: Modding can enhance performance but may reduce collector value if not done tastefully and reversibly.

questionsToAsk: When was the last rotary rebuild, and who performed it?
Are there any known issues with the cooling system or oil coolers?
Have the vacuum lines been replaced or serviced recently?
enthusiastTake: This RX-7 is a fantastic example of a JDM legend, but be prepared for the quirks and costs of rotary ownership.

performanceSpecs.jdmNote: JDM models often have slightly more power due to fewer emissions restrictions.

alternatives.name: Nissan Silvia S15 Spec-R
alternatives.whySuited: For those who love JDM coupes with turbocharged engines and rear-wheel drive dynamics.
alternatives.howDiffers: The SR20DET engine is more conventional and less maintenance-intensive than a rotary.

alternatives.name: Toyota Supra JZA80
alternatives.whySuited: Another iconic JDM sports car with a legendary engine and strong aftermarket support.
alternatives.howDiffers: The 2JZ-GTE engine is renowned for its durability and power potential, unlike the rotary.

alternatives.name: Honda NSX NA1
alternatives.whySuited: For those seeking a mid-engine JDM classic with a naturally aspirated V6 and timeless design.
alternatives.howDiffers: The NSX offers a more exotic driving experience with its mid-engine layout and Honda reliability.
